entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop affected by bud necrosis disease

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS
entities.description: A disease causing significant crop losses in India and other Asian countries

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Location where peanut bud necrosis was first reported and caused high economic losses

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: Location where peanut bud necrosis is economically important

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: Location where peanut bud necrosis is economically important

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: Location where peanut bud necrosis is economically important

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus originally reported as the causal agent of peanut bud necrosis

entities.name: VIRUS PURIFICATION
entities.description: Process used to isolate the causal virus of peanut bud necrosis

entities.name: SEROLOGY
entities.description: Method used to determine the relationships between viruses based on antisera

entities.name: THRIPS TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of virus transmission by thrips used to identify the causal agent

entities.name: TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: The genus of the virus identified as the cause of peanut bud necrosis

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The distinct tospovirus identified as the causal agent of peanut bud necrosis

entities.name: MONOCLONAL ANTIBODIES
entities.description: Antibodies produced against the nucleocapsid protein of PBNV

entities.name: NUCLEOCAPSID PROTEIN
entities.description: The protein of PBNV used for the production of monoclonal antibodies

entities.name: TSWV-LETTUCE ISOLATE
entities.description: A specific isolate of tomato spotted wilt virus used in diagnostic testing

entities.name: IMPATIENS NECROTIC SPOT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus used to test the specificity of PBNV monoclonal antibodies

entities.name: TAS-ELISA
entities.description: A triple-antibody sandwich enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used for virus diagnosis
